route53resolver.resolverconfig.Autodefin.Docs: Represents the desired status of `AutodefinedReverse`. The only supported value on creation is `DISABLE`. Deletion of this resource will return `AutodefinedReverse` to its default value of `ENABLED`.

route53resolver.resolverconfig.ResourceI.Docs: The ID of the Amazon Virtual Private Cloud VPC that you're configuring Resolver for.
